title: Revenue Recognition Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger revenue recognition foundations judgment so accounting work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Revenue Recognition Foundations is a leverage point inside accounting. It supports the broader goal of p&l, balance sheet, tax basics, and bookkeeping hygiene.
coreConcepts: Revenue Recognition Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good revenue recognition foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Revenue Recognition Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
